data.title: CON EDISON DECLARES COMMON STOCK DIVIDEND
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Consolidated Edison, Inc. (Con Edison) announced a quarterly dividend of 88.75 cents per share on its common stock. The dividend is set to be paid on June 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 13, 2026. Con Edison, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ED, operates as a holding company for various subsidiaries in the energy sector.
US CENTCOM: No vessels violating blockade so far.

data.title: Cable One to Host Conference Call to Discuss First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Phoenix-based Cable One, Inc. (NYSE: CABO) has scheduled a conference call on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 5 p.m. ET to discuss its first quarter 2026 results. The company will release the results after the market closes on the same day. To participate, individuals can access a live audio webcast on the Cable One Investor Relations website at ir.cableone.net or dial 1-833-461-5787 (International: 1-585-XXXXXXX).

data.title: Lincoln Electric Board Declares Dividend
data.description: A report from Cleveland revealed that Lincoln Electric Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: LECO) recently advised that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.79 per common share. The dividend is set to be disbursed on July 15, 2026, to shareholders as of June 30, 2026. Lincoln Electric is recognized as a prominent figure in high-performance industrial machinery and technology, aiding clients in the manufacturing and upkeep of essential equipment and infrastructure. Their cutting-edge solutions are designed to enhance overall quality.

data.title: ProPetro schedules Q1 2026 earnings call.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.5%, a significant increase from the previous month. This translates to approximately 10.4 million people currently without jobs. The government has expressed concern over this uptick and is considering measures to address the situation. Additionally, the inflation rate has also seen a slight increase to 2.3%, indicating a rise in overall prices of goods and services. Experts suggest that these economic indicators may lead to challenges for the country's economy in the coming months.

data.title: Americans have become more likely to say Trump is not too or not at all religious
data.description: A recent survey by the Pew Research Center reveals that 70% of Americans do not view President Donald Trump as very religious, an increase of 8 percentage points from a similar poll conducted in fall 2024. The findings also indicate a shifting perception among Republicans...

data.title: Darling Ingredients Inc. to Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Darling Ingredients Inc. (NYSE: DAR) will hold a conference call on April 30, 2026, at 9 a.m. Eastern Time to review first quarter 2026 financial results. The numbers will be disclosed earlier that day. The call will also cover company operations. Investors can find a presentation and financial data on darlingii.com/investors. Registration is required to participate as a listener.

data.title: NOTUS, a politics site, rebrands to 'The Star' to enhance local news and sports coverage post layoffs at The Washington Post.
data.description: A prominent publication based in Washington is undergoing a rebranding process to enhance its coverage of local news and sports. This decision comes following a significant downsizing at The Washington Post.

data.title: BlackSky to Host First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
data.description: BlackSky, based in Herndon, Virginia, is set to hold a conference call to discuss its first quarter financial results for the year 2026. This event is scheduled to provide investors and analysts with insights into the company's performance during the initial months of the year. This initiative signifies the company's commitment to transparency and communication with stakeholders. Stay tuned for updates on the key figures and highlights from this conference call.

data.title: Albany International Schedules First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Albany International Corp. (NYSE:AIN) revealed plans to disclose its first-quarter 2026 results on April 30, 2026, before the market opens. A webcast discussing the results is scheduled for 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on April 30, 2026. Those interested can tune in to the live webcast through the Company’s Investor Relations website at investors.albint.com or by registering through the provided link. Additionally, participants can access the event by dialing the designated number.

data.title: Grinex, a Russian crypto exchange, stops trading citing a $13M exploit by 'foreign special services'.
data.description: A Russian cryptocurrency exchange called Grinex has temporarily halted its trading services following a security breach resulting in a loss of $13 million. The exchange claims that the exploit was carried out by what it refers to as "foreign special services."

data.title: Geron Corporation Reports Inducement Grant Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In Foster City, California, on April 14, 2026, Geron Corporation announced that they have awarded a stock option to Timothy Williams, the new Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer, and Corporate Secretary. The option allows Williams to purchase 2,500,000 shares of Geron common stock. This equity award was given to entice Williams to accept the position with the commercial stage biopharmaceutical company.

data.title: Has Bitcoin Bottomed? No, But It Could In May, Analyst Says
data.description: A crypto analyst, Benjamin Cowen, suggests that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) could potentially reach a market bottom in May, but this would require a significant sharp drop in prices. The more likely scenario, based on historical market cycles, points to a bottom around October 2026. Cowen stated in a podcast on Apr. 15 that while a May bottom is feasible, it is considered a less probable outcome unless there is a notable deviation from past trends. He highlighted similarities between the current cycle and previous midterm-year patterns, indicating a sideways market movement before a more decisive phase. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: NiSource Announces Strategic Energy Infrastructure Agreements to Enhance Customer Value and Economic Growth in Indiana
data.description: NiSource Inc. (NYSE: NI) has revealed a fresh long-term energy deal with an Alphabet Inc. subsidiary. This deal is set to aid in the establishment and management of a sizeable data center in northern Indiana, bringing advantages to current customers and nearby communities. The agreement, the second to utilize NiSource’s groundbreaking solution, NIPSCO Generation LLC (GenCo), seeks to offer value to the existing system.

data.title: TriNet to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 30
data.description: In Dublin, California on April 16, 2026, TriNet, known as a top provider of HR solutions for small and medium-sized businesses, disclosed plans to unveil financial outcomes for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, prior to the commencement of the U.S. market trading session. TriNet is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol TNET.

data.title: Simmons First National Corporation Reports First Quarter EPS of $0.47
data.description: In Pine Bluff, Arkansas, as of April 16, 2026, financial data for the first quarter of 2026 and comparisons with the fourth quarter of 2025 and first quarter of 2025 were released. Key income statement figures (in millions) for 1Q26 versus 4Q25 include: a net income of $68.5 million and diluted earnings per share (EPS) of $0.47. Additionally, adjusted net income was reported at $68.6 million.
